summary: Completed testing of Admin Panel live data integration. All 15 backend API tests passed. Frontend Admin Panel successfully displays live data from backend APIs: Dashboard Statistics (54 contestants, 2.5K votes, $0 revenue, 0 pending), Top Contestants with photos and vote counts, Recent Votes with emails and timestamps, and Recent Payments (empty as expected).

issues: WebSocket connection warning in console (non-blocking) - 'WebSocket is closed before the connection is established'

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing 54 contestants and 2502 votes
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Panel dashboard is fully connected to live backend APIs. Dashboard stats, votes, and payments APIs all working correctly. Admin login flow: /backbon/admin-login -> Portal Home -> 'Open Dashboard' -> /portal/admin

admin_login.details: Login with admin@glowingstar.net / admin123 works correctly

dashboard_stats_api.details: GET /api/admin/dashboard-stats returns correct structure with contestants, payments, votes, contest info

admin_votes_api.details: GET /api/admin/votes returns list of votes with id, email, contestant_id, created_at

admin_payments_api.details: GET /api/admin/payments returns payments list, totals, and counts (empty as expected)

admin_stats_api.details: GET /api/admin/stats returns total_contestants, total_votes, total_categories, pending_approvals

dashboard_ui_stats.details: Dashboard displays: Total Contestants (54), Total Votes (2.5K), Revenue ($0), Pending Approvals (0)

top_contestants_section.details: Shows top 5 contestants with photos, names, categories, and vote counts (Jasmine Sanchez #1 with 4.8K votes)

recent_payments_section.details: Shows 'No payments recorded yet' (correct - no Stripe payments made)

recent_votes_section.details: Shows actual vote records with voter emails (voter2561@example.com, etc.) and timestamps

api_authentication.details: All admin APIs correctly require authentication (return 401/403 without token)

api_data_verification.payments: Empty list (expected - no payments made yet)

mocked_apis.Email OTP: MOCKED - Logs to console instead of sending actual emails via SendGrid
